info.title: Soda Cloud REST API
info.description: The Soda Cloud REST API enables programmatic access to trigger data quality scans, retrieve check results, update incident status, manage datasets, datasources, contracts, runners, secrets, notification rules, and integrate data quality workflows into CI/CD pipelines. Supports EU and US cloud regions.

get.description: Verifies API connectivity and validates that authentication and authorization details are accurate and the API is ready to accept calls.
Retrieve paginated check results. Users see only checks for datasets with View dataset permissions; Admins see all.

parameters.name: checkIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of check IDs (max 1000, cannot combine with other filters)

delete.description: Deletes a check by ID. Requires Manage checks permission; Admins can delete all checks.

parameters.name: checkId
parameters.description: Identifier of the check to delete

get.description: Retrieve the status and results of a scan by scan ID.

parameters.name: scanId
parameters.description: Scan identifier from the trigger response

delete.description: Cancels a queued or running scan. Changes state to canceled (if pending) or cancelationRequested (if submitted).

get.description: Retrieve paginated log entries for a specific scan.

post.description: Update the title, description, severity, status, or resolution notes of an incident.

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Identifier of the incident to update

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of datasets with optional filtering.
Retrieve a single dataset by its qualified name.
Retrieve a single dataset by its ID.

post.description: Update dataset metadata including label, tags, attributes, owners, and configuration settings.

delete.description: Delete a dataset. Deletion is not immediate and can take some time to complete.

schema.description: Mapping of column names to attribute key-value pairs

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of discovered datasets available for onboarding.

post.description: Create a new V4 datasource from a YAML configuration.
Initiates an async connection test. Returns 202 with operation ID to poll.

delete.description: Remove datasource and all associated resources (async operation).

post.description: Async operation to onboard discovered datasets from a datasource.
Generates a skeleton contract for a dataset (async).
AI-powered async contract generation for multiple datasets.
Requires MANAGE_NOTIFICATION_RULES permission. Performs full replacement.
Requires MANAGE_DATASOURCES_AND_AGENTS permission. Returns apiKeyId and apiKeySecret (only available at creation time).

delete.description: Only self-hosted runners can be deleted. Cannot delete in-use runners. Requires MANAGE_DATASOURCES_AND_AGENTS permission.

get.description: Retrieve the JWK format public key for encrypting secrets.

post.description: Send invitations to new users (up to 10 per request).

basicAuth.description: Base64-encoded API key ID and secret: base64(api_key_id:api_key_secret)
